description: 留存与活跃分析盘示例，覆盖活跃、留存、深度使用与流失。

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(active_accounts, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT count(distinct ownerId) as active_accounts FROM log))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT diff[1] as today, diff[2] as yesterday, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(active_accounts, 86400) as diff FROM (SELECT count(distinct ownerId) as active_accounts FROM log))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT diff[1] as current_7d, diff[2] as previous_7d, round((diff[3]-1.0)*100, 2) as growth FROM (SELECT compare(active_accounts, 604800) as diff FROM (SELECT count(distinct ownerId) as active_accounts FROM log))

A.compareValueDescription: 较上一个 7 天窗口变化

display.markdownStr:
### 当前缺口

- `AI 月度渗透率` 仍缺 CMS 全量月活母体。
- 当前示例盘只落已验证视图，不虚构缺失指标。

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, count(distinct ownerId) as active_accounts FROM log GROUP BY t ORDER BY t LIMIT 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) as t, count(distinct ownerId) as active_accounts FROM log GROUP BY t ORDER BY t LIMIT 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | WITH weekly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('week', __time__) as wk, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY wk, ownerId), retention AS (SELECT curr.wk as cohort_week, count(*) as cohort_users, count_if(next.ownerId IS NOT NULL) as retained_users FROM weekly_users curr LEFT JOIN weekly_users next ON curr.ownerId = next.ownerId AND next.wk = date_add('day', 7, curr.wk) GROUP BY curr.wk) SELECT cohort_week, cohort_users, retained_users, round(retained_users * 100.0 / nullif(cohort_users, 0), 2) as retention_rate FROM retention ORDER BY cohort_week LIMIT 20
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | WITH weekly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('week', __time__) as wk, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY wk, ownerId), retention AS (SELECT curr.wk as cohort_week, count(*) as cohort_users, count_if(next.ownerId IS NOT NULL) as retained_users FROM weekly_users curr LEFT JOIN weekly_users next ON curr.ownerId = next.ownerId AND next.wk = date_add('day', 7, curr.wk) GROUP BY curr.wk) SELECT cohort_week, cohort_users, retained_users, round(retained_users * 100.0 / nullif(cohort_users, 0), 2) as retention_rate FROM retention ORDER BY cohort_week LIMIT 20

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | WITH monthly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY m, ownerId), retention AS (SELECT curr.m as cohort_month, count(*) as cohort_users, count_if(next.ownerId IS NOT NULL) as retained_users FROM monthly_users curr LEFT JOIN monthly_users next ON curr.ownerId = next.ownerId AND next.m = date_add('month', 1, curr.m) GROUP BY curr.m) SELECT cohort_month, cohort_users, retained_users, round(retained_users * 100.0 / nullif(cohort_users, 0), 2) as retention_rate FROM retention ORDER BY cohort_month LIMIT 12
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | WITH monthly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY m, ownerId), retention AS (SELECT curr.m as cohort_month, count(*) as cohort_users, count_if(next.ownerId IS NOT NULL) as retained_users FROM monthly_users curr LEFT JOIN monthly_users next ON curr.ownerId = next.ownerId AND next.m = date_add('month', 1, curr.m) GROUP BY curr.m) SELECT cohort_month, cohort_users, retained_users, round(retained_users * 100.0 / nullif(cohort_users, 0), 2) as retention_rate FROM retention ORDER BY cohort_month LIMIT 12

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | WITH user_business AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, userId as owner_id, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type FROM log GROUP BY m, owner_id, business_type), user_monthly AS (SELECT m, owner_id, count(distinct business_type) as business_count FROM user_business GROUP BY m, owner_id), summary AS (SELECT m, count(*) as monthly_active_users, count_if(business_count >= 3) as ai_native_users FROM user_monthly GROUP BY m) SELECT m, monthly_active_users, ai_native_users, round(ai_native_users * 100.0 / nullif(monthly_active_users, 0), 2) as ai_native_share FROM summary ORDER BY m LIMIT 12
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | WITH user_business AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, userId as owner_id, CASE WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('sql_diagnosis', 'sql_generation') THEN 'sql' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('main', 'agent_main', 'sop', 'sop_recommend') THEN 'ops' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('intelligent_recommend') THEN 'recommend' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('spl_generation', 'spl_simple_qa', 'spl_intent_recognition', 'spl_diagnosis', 'promql') THEN 'query_language' WHEN regexp_extract(agentId, '.*\\.([^.]+)@.*', 1) IN ('trace-analysis', 'apm-analysis', 'logstore_analysis', 'alert-rule-analysis', 'log_cluster_result_analysis', 'metricset_abnormal_analysis', 'probe_diagnosis') THEN 'analysis' ELSE 'other' END as business_type FROM log GROUP BY m, owner_id, business_type), user_monthly AS (SELECT m, owner_id, count(distinct business_type) as business_count FROM user_business GROUP BY m, owner_id), summary AS (SELECT m, count(*) as monthly_active_users, count_if(business_count >= 3) as ai_native_users FROM user_monthly GROUP BY m) SELECT m, monthly_active_users, ai_native_users, round(ai_native_users * 100.0 / nullif(monthly_active_users, 0), 2) as ai_native_share FROM summary ORDER BY m LIMIT 12

basicOptions.displayName: 深度使用旅程占比趋势

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | WITH monthly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY m, ownerId), churn AS (SELECT prev.m as base_month, count(*) as prev_active, count_if(curr.ownerId IS NULL) as churned_users FROM monthly_users prev LEFT JOIN monthly_users curr ON prev.ownerId = curr.ownerId AND curr.m = date_add('month', 1, prev.m) GROUP BY prev.m) SELECT base_month, prev_active, churned_users, round(churned_users * 100.0 / nullif(prev_active, 0), 2) as churn_rate FROM churn ORDER BY base_month LIMIT 12
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | WITH monthly_users AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', __time__) as m, ownerId FROM log GROUP BY m, ownerId), churn AS (SELECT prev.m as base_month, count(*) as prev_active, count_if(curr.ownerId IS NULL) as churned_users FROM monthly_users prev LEFT JOIN monthly_users curr ON prev.ownerId = curr.ownerId AND curr.m = date_add('month', 1, prev.m) GROUP BY prev.m) SELECT base_month, prev_active, churned_users, round(churned_users * 100.0 / nullif(prev_active, 0), 2) as churn_rate FROM churn ORDER BY base_month LIMIT 12
